title: JeremyQuo/ONT_DRS_bacteria_script: verson v1
author: QuoZhihao
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Script of our Paper "Analysis of Transcriptome and Epitranscriptome in Bacteria Using Nanopore Direct RNA Sequencing" 
 This repository contains the script for generating figures mentioned in the article, as well as the intermediate files (also uploaded to  Github  )
